title: Opening for Category Manager at Babyoye Global Group

jsonLd.title: Opening for Category Manager at Babyoye Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Babyoye Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Category Manager for our Bhubaneswar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Babyoye Global Group:
Babyoye Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Babyoye Global Group!
